examples: Air France passengers are treated to a delectable spread and smiling service.
Do something you enjoy like going to your favorite restaurant or eating a delectable dessert.
Following our conversation, we all feasted on a delectable lunch prepared by Can Xue's husband.
Upon arrival make sure you join the queue for a delectable country-style bacon and egg roll.
If you're cooking red meat, choose thin, porous cuts of meat for the most delectable results.
